text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the fall of Agnes Digital's junior year, and the
other runners are staying active throughout this
season.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I'm over here! Finally, the big race is
starting! I've been dying to see this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The start of this year's Mile Championship is just
moments away! Who do you think will be first to
fly down the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here's King Halo coming in from outside! King
Halo! King Halo finishes second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that, King fans? It's a shame I
couldn't finish first, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've found my new path on the Sprint and Mile
tour! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear the confidence in her voice?!
Ohhhh, the tears are flowing down my face like
waterfalls!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you get what she's talking about? Do you
want me to explain? I'm gonna explain, okay?
Omg, I really can't turn off the waterworks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes on without giving me a moment to
respond.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King was always focusing on going down the
traditional route in order to prove her skill to her
mother because she respects her so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But then! Oh, man! She wowed everyone by
changing paths this year! She turned her back on
what she once longed for.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She's showing us that being true to herself and
finding her own path is the best way to gain her
mother's respect!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She struggled a lot after making her decision, but
she's overcome those doubts today! I know all
about how difficult that was for her! I could fill my
entire timeline talking about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to stop her once she gets going about
Umamusume. Running on the track herself has
only deepened her attachment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Quick, Trainer. Hide.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's another Umamusume lost in a chasm of
worry, just like King was.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Look, there she is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Everyone was so incredible, yet... here I am...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto's progress has slowed recently, allowing
Opera O to rocket ahead of her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O has been the center of attention at the
Classics, so, naturally, she's considered the
favorite for the Arima Kinen this year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Doto still hasn't run in a single G1
race yet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The old me would simply bask in the inspiration
from Doto trying her hardest...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now that I've debuted, I feel like I understand
her struggle a little.
choice_data_list: If only she knew what's causing her slump.
If only she knew what's causing her slump.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I know exactly what's causing it. It's clear as day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital claims to understand so casually
that I have to ask her what the reason is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Which is to say, Doto isn't fully race-ready yet.
She's still growing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You know about Umamusume's race-readiness,
right? It's the time when they transform from cute
little sprouts into fiery smokeshows.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto is what you'd consider a late bloomer. She's
still waiting to sprout.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So there's really no need for her to worry! Her
problems will resolve themselves with time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...That's my diagnosis at least, speaking as
someone who has observed lots and lots of Umas.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I really hope that someone notices and says
something to her. I bet you that would go a long
way toward easing her anxiety.
choice_data_list: What if that someone was you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's Yu?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaagh?! M-m-m-me?! Nowaynoway! No. Waaay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It would be way too impudent for someone like
me to impose my opinion on her! And what if it
somehow made things worse?! What would I do?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fans don't give advice to their idols! And any fan
who forgets their place gets hit with the
banhammer...
choice_data_list: But you're not just a fan anymore, are you?
But you're not just a fan anymore, are you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
E-everyone's welcome to their own opinions. But
there's an unbreachable wall separating me and
Doto.
choice_data_list: How about approaching her as a fellow runner?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A fellow runner? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying... Listen, I'm just a plain old
runner. But Doto... She's a runner with
immeasurable charm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Although... now that I'm a runner too, I do kinda
have a sense of how she feels...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital grows silent for a moment. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? You really think I should say something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I still feel like it would be super arrogant of me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... If a fellow simp says so, I'll try and work up
the confidence. I won't run away...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll... um... just say a few words... Nothing big...
Oh, but that's still taboo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Digital hypes herself up, and then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uhhhhh, h-hey, Doto! Do you have a moment to
talk? It'll only take five seconds, I promise.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh? Do you need something, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you know about race-readiness? It's pretty
useful information. If you want, I can tell you
about it a bit. So, basically, you know how you're
an Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night, Agnes Digital is feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I really did it now. I went up to the real-life
Doto and totally lost it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I lectured her for ten whole minutes! I was
babbling away as fast as a machine gun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just want to go throw myself at her feet and beg
for forgiveness...
choice_data_list:
Do you think what you said is going to help
her?

Do you think what you said is going to help
her?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I... I don't have enough self-esteem left to even
dare hope so... I'm just a chicken...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know I've debuted and all that, but I'm still only
supposed to simp quietly from the sidelines...
How could I have forgotten myself like that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital broke her vow of non-intervention.
What happens now, nobody knows.
